overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in futuristic combat armor walking through a luxurious modern building entrance at night. The scene features wet reflective concrete surfaces, dramatic uplighting, tropical landscaping, and a distinctive teal-orange cyberpunk aesthetic.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the camera through the covered entrance walkway

entered.detail: large angular concrete roof structure with geometric lines
dense green foliage lining the left side of the walkway
smooth tan-colored modern building wall with accent lighting
tall vertical light beams illuminating the entrance from below
wet reflective stone tiles with visible cracks and puddles

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the camera through a covered luxury entrance walkway. The scene features a high modern canopy overhead, tropical hedges on the left, and dramatic uplighting creating vertical beams of light against the night sky. The wet cracked floor reflects the ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved exterior walkway along glass facade

events.description: character turns right at the entrance and begins walking along the building facade, camera shifts to follow from behind

agents.ego_description: turning right at the entrance threshold and proceeding along the building's curved exterior walkway

entered.detail: angular concrete overhang with dramatic ceiling lines
large transparent facade revealing interior lighting
glowing cyan signage visible in the distance through the glass
warm orange recessed lights along the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and walks along the curved exterior of the building, with the camera now following from behind. The glass curtain wall reveals interior spaces and distant neon signage, while warm accent lighting illuminates the right wall. The geometric roof structure creates dramatic shadows overhead as the character moves away from the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a head-on approach through a luxury entrance to a trailing perspective along the building's curved exterior. It begins with the character walking toward the camera under a high modern canopy, flanked by tropical hedges and vertical beams of dramatic uplighting that reflect off a wet, cracked floor. As the character reaches the foreground, the camera pivots to follow from behind while the path curves to the right. The scene then opens up to reveal a glass curtain wall showcasing interior spaces and distant neon signage, with warm accent lighting illuminating the adjacent wall. Finally, the movement carries the character away from the entrance, passing beneath a geometric roof structure that casts deep, dramatic shadows overhead.
